title: pixlii
description: A Minecraft resource pack aiming to add simple retextures to various items in the game!
body:
This pack aims to add a variety of unspecific item and GUI retextures - as of writing, it contains retextures for the entire hotbar gui, all basic material tools, armor, books, buckets, and a few other simple retextures. 

The overarching goal is to retexture every single 16x16 item, alongside the hotbar/GUI and a few related blocks or other textures.
